Chronology of every recorded fact about [[hunger aura]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Subject One was a man warped by hunger aura.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — The wave of power from Sacred Valley was a hunger aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — The hunger aura felt like an endless, gnawing greed for more.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The power emanating from within the labyrinth is an all-consuming hunger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — The hunger aura grinds away a person's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — The hunger aura can suppress spatial artifacts in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Hunger aura can erode a Monarch's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon suspects a phenomenon in the labyrinth is caused by hunger aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — A disgusting white hunger aura can take the shape of a person leeched of color.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — The hunger aura is eating away at the natural treasures in the room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon senses a hunger aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — The hunger aura can make people weak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — The hunger aura can devour mental energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — The hunger aura is thick in the labyrinth chamber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Hunger aura is not a natural force; it is a corruption of the natural order of Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Hunger aura is a manifestation of ambition and selfish desire created by the presence of the Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Hunger aura corrupts Remnants, natural spirits, sacred beasts, and humans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — The hunger aura howled as the script-lights flickered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Reigan Shen's body has been eroded by exposure to hunger aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The hunger aura will exceed containment if Subject One is removed.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Hunger aura is entangled with the Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Hunger aura exploded from the Silent King's corpse and empowered other Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Hunger aura only shows up when Monarchs stay too long.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Northstrider used an aura of blood and hunger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Hunger aura erupted from the Weeping Dragon upon its death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Hunger aura is affecting Lindon's body.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
